context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the broadway-data-pipelines instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `Broadway.Message.failed/2` for errors** — never raise in `handle_message/3`

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Implement `handle_failed/2`** — dead-letter handling must be explicit for every pipeline

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use batchers for database inserts** — don't insert one-by-one; batch size of 100 is a good default

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define the pipeline module** — implement `handle_message/3` and `handle_batch/4` callbacks

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify producer connectivity** — confirm the producer connects on startup
